mapper.insert: insert into demo_order(order_no, user_id, product_name, sku_name, order_amount, pay_status, order_status, logistics_status, after_sale_status, paid_at, shipped_at, signed_at) values(#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{productName}, #{skuName}, #{orderAmount}, #{payStatus}, #{orderStatus}, #{logisticsStatus}, coalesce(#{afterSaleStatus}, 'NONE'), #{paidAt}, #{shippedAt}, #{signedAt})
mapper.update: update demo_order set after_sale_status=#{status} where id=#{id}
